2189060.name: RealRTCW - Vanilla Plus (obsolete, will be removed)
2189060.description:
Vanilla Plus is trying to preserve the original game feel even more while still keeping RealRTCW QOL improvements.

Vanilla Plus features:
  • Vanilla weapon models and textures
  • Vanilla pickup models
  • Vanilla weapon and ambient sounds
  • Vanilla weapon balance
  • Vanilla loading screens
  • Removal of the recoil effect
  • Achievements, additional enemies mode are available

Its recommended to use "Classic" arsenal option for the best vanilla-like experience.

If you want to get back to HD version of the mod - just disable Vanilla Plus DLC in the RealRTCW properties on Steam.
2189060.supported_languages:
英语*, 俄语*, 乌克兰语, 法语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
